patchNoteLines.li: Bugfix: one of the options for the Archaeological Discovery event had swapped outcomes
Bugfix: the production bonus from the immigrant event wouldn't survive a save/load cycle
Land Rush and Power Surplus have been slightly altered to work around the faction-scope restriction of some of their stat bonuses
Bugfix: certain events wouldn't respect the "disable events with options" mod setting
Golden Age can be disabled in the mod settings
Add mod version to the mod settings

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Daily Cadence Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Updates the Labor Dispute event to actually respect the Daily Cadence rework in Empire Refactored.

patchNoteLines.li: Divide worker base cost values by 5 in Labor Dispute to respect the Daily Cadence update
